coloring.title: 🖌️ Digital Coloring Canvas
coloring.description: Professional-grade digital coloring canvas with advanced brushes, layers, symmetry tools, color palettes, and undo/redo functionality. Perfect for therapeutic coloring, digital art creation, and mindful relaxation with ADHD-friendly features.

vector.title: ✨ AI Vector Magic Converter
vector.description: Transform raster images into perfect scalable vector graphics using advanced AI technology. Features color control, batch processing, multiple export formats (SVG, PDF, AI), and intelligent edge detection for professional results.

text.title: 📝 Advanced Text Formatter
text.description: Intelligent text formatting and styling tool with case conversion, spacing adjustments, character encoding, line breaks, and typography transformations. Perfect for creating unique designs and professional text layouts.

docEditor.title: 📄 Document Metadata Editor
docEditor.description: Comprehensive PDF and document metadata editor for viewing, editing, and managing file properties. Perfect for organizing digital documents, adding author information, and managing document libraries.

driveLens.title: 🔍 AI Drive Lens Photo Manager
driveLens.description: AI-powered Google Drive photo management system with Gemini AI integration. Browse, organize, analyze, and manage your photos with intelligent tagging, duplicate detection, visual search, and automated album creation.

about.title: About Us
about.pageTitle: About SoftBrain Space - Therapeutic Art & Creative Wellness
about.heroSubtitle: Where creativity meets calm, and every line tells a story of focus, peace, and therapeutic expression.
about.description: SoftBrain Space offers therapeutic art experiences and creative wellness tools designed for ADHD support, anxiety relief, and mindful expression. Discover our comprehensive suite of free creative tools including digital coloring canvas, AI vector converter, text formatter, document editor, and AI photo manager.

story.paragraph1: SoftBrain Space was born from a simple belief: creativity is therapy, and everyone deserves access to tools that help them find calm in the chaos. We combine evidence-based art therapy principles with modern technology to create accessible therapeutic experiences.
story.paragraph2: We specialize in black and white line-art coloring books, doodles, and stickers designed specifically for adults and children with ADHD. Our designs emphasize therapeutic benefits while celebrating the joy of creation, and we complement our physical products with a comprehensive suite of free digital creative tools.
story.paragraph3: What started as a personal journey to manage ADHD through art has grown into a community of thousands who have discovered the power of mindful coloring, digital creativity, and therapeutic expression through our innovative tools and resources.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide accessible, therapeutic art experiences and creative wellness tools that help people with ADHD and anxiety find focus, calm, and creative expression through evidence-based art therapy, digital tools, and mindful creative practices.

whyLineArt.title: Why Line Art?
whyLineArt.subtitle: Black and white line art offers a unique therapeutic experience backed by research in art therapy and neuroscience:

clearBoundaries.title: Clear Boundaries
clearBoundaries.description: Reduce decision fatigue with defined spaces

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Art therapy should be available to everyone, regardless of skill level or background. We design for all abilities and provide free tools alongside our products.

mindfulness.title: Mindfulness
mindfulness.description: Every design is crafted to promote focus and calm. We study patterns that naturally guide the mind into a meditative state.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We create thoughtful designs that serve a therapeutic purpose. Each piece is tested and refined to ensure it delivers the intended calming effect.

community.title: Community
community.description: We're building a supportive space for creative expression where everyone feels welcome to share their journey and inspire others.

testimonials.title: Voices from Our Community
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people who have found peace through therapeutic coloring

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a_therapeutic: Therapeutic coloring books are specially designed line-art illustrations that promote relaxation, stress reduction, and mindfulness. The complex patterns help with concentration and create a calm state through creative expression. They are particularly effective for people with ADHD or anxiety.
faq.a_skill_level: Our coloring books are suitable for all skill levels, from beginners to experienced artists. We offer a variety of designs, from simple to complex patterns, so you can choose what best matches your preferences and experience.
faq.a_materials: You can use any coloring medium you prefer - colored pencils, gel pens, felt tip pens, watercolors, or markers. Our printed editions use high-quality paper that accepts various media.
faq.q_order: How do I place an order?
faq.a_order: Browse our store page, add items to your cart, and complete checkout. You can choose between digital and printed products. Our secure payment process ensures a smooth shopping experience.
faq.a_shipping_time: Printed products are typically shipped within 3-7 business days after order confirmation. International orders may take longer depending on the destination. Digital products are available immediately after purchase.
faq.a_international: Yes, we ship to many countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times vary depending on the destination. Available shipping options will be shown at checkout.
faq.a_returns: For printed products, we accept returns only for defective items. Please contact us within 7 days of receipt. Digital products are not eligible for return due to their nature, but we offer support for issues with your purchase.
faq.q_digital: How do I download digital products?
faq.a_digital: After purchasing a digital product, you will receive an email with a download link. You can also access it anytime through your account's order history. Files are provided in PDF format and can be used on your preferred device.
faq.q_print_multiple: Can I print digital products multiple times?
faq.a_print_multiple: Yes, you can print purchased digital products as many times as you wish for personal use. However, reselling, redistributing, or sharing the files is not permitted.
faq.a_wholesale: Yes, we offer wholesale prices for orders of 50 units or more. This is ideal for retailers, classrooms, or therapeutic settings. Contact us for a detailed quote.
faq.q_therapy_use: Can I use these in my therapeutic practice?
faq.a_therapy_use: Yes, our coloring books are frequently used in art therapy, occupational therapy, and counseling practices. Contact us about licensing options for professional use.
faq.contactPrompt: Didn't find the answer you're looking for?
